title: polycodium candicans
intro: Polycodium candicans, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a type of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as the ability to protect against UV radiation. The health benefits of Polycodium candicans include reducing the risk of skin cancer and protecting against the negative effects of UV exposure, making it a popular ingredient in skincare products. Herbal preparations of Polycodium candicans can be found in the form of extracts, capsules, and topical creams, which are used to promote skin health and reduce the signs of aging.
